title: betula celtiberica
intro: Betula celtiberica, also known as Celtiberian Birch, is a species of birch tree native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Betula celtiberica include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Betula celtiberica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
